rationale: EE L4 splits each L3 by IEEE Transaction sub-topic. ICs by signal class; semiconductors by device type; wireless by generation + topology; AI hardware by computing paradigm. Engineering L3 is already specific, so this is a lighter 1-3 L4 per L3 pass.

leaves.name: ADC/DAC Design
leaves.tagline: ADC + DAC design, mixed-signal for sensing + comms, time-interleaved ADCs.

leaves.name: RF & mm-Wave Power Amplifiers
leaves.tagline: RF + mm-wave power amplifiers, mm-wave RFIC design.

leaves.name: Phased-Array RFIC
leaves.tagline: Phased-array RFIC, mm-wave beamforming ICs.

leaves.name: Low-Power Digital VLSI
leaves.tagline: Low-power digital VLSI, near-threshold computing, power-gating techniques.

leaves.name: DC-DC Converters & PMICs
leaves.tagline: DC-DC converters, switched-capacitor, wireless power IC, energy-harvesting IC.

leaves.name: FinFET, GAA & Sub-3nm Devices
leaves.tagline: FinFET, GAA nanosheet, sub-3nm device physics, CFET architectures.

leaves.name: 2D-Channel Transistors
leaves.tagline: 2D-channel transistors, MoS2 + WS2 FETs, novel 2D-channel devices.

leaves.name: GaN Power Devices
leaves.tagline: GaN power devices, GaN-on-Si, vertical GaN devices.

leaves.name: SiC MOSFETs
leaves.tagline: SiC MOSFETs, SiC power module design, EV applications.

leaves.name: Semiconductor Lasers & VCSELs
leaves.tagline: Semiconductor lasers, VCSELs, LiDAR laser arrays.

leaves.name: SPAD & Single-Photon Detectors
leaves.tagline: SPADs, single-photon detector arrays, dToF + iToF SPAD imaging.

leaves.name: Silicon Photonic ICs
leaves.tagline: Silicon photonic ICs, optical interconnects on chip, photonic computing devices.

leaves.name: Coherent Fiber Communications
leaves.tagline: Coherent fiber comms, DSP for long-haul, hollow-core fiber transmission.

leaves.name: Metalenses & Programmable Metasurfaces
leaves.tagline: Metalenses, programmable metasurfaces, achromatic metasurfaces.

leaves.name: Beamforming & DOA Estimation
leaves.tagline: Beamforming + DOA estimation, robust adaptive beamforming, array calibration.

leaves.name: Speech Enhancement & Source Separation
leaves.tagline: Speech enhancement + source separation, neural source separation, dereverberation.

leaves.name: Learned Signal Processing
leaves.tagline: Learned signal processing, unrolled networks, learned sparse SP.

leaves.name: Computational MRI & CT Reconstruction
leaves.tagline: Computational MRI + CT reconstruction, learned reconstruction, accelerated MRI.

leaves.name: Lensless & Computational Imaging
leaves.tagline: Lensless imaging, computational imaging architectures, single-pixel imaging.

leaves.name: Neural Video Codecs
leaves.tagline: Neural video codecs, learned image + video compression, VVC + AV1 alternatives.

leaves.name: MPC & Robust Control
leaves.tagline: MPC, robust + adaptive control, scenario MPC, tube MPC.

leaves.name: Multi-Agent & CPS Control
leaves.tagline: Multi-agent + CPS control, distributed control, networked control over lossy links.

leaves.name: Robot Actuators & Drives
leaves.tagline: Robot actuators + drives, series elastic actuators, robot mechatronic design.

leaves.name: Grid Stability & Protection
leaves.tagline: Grid stability + protection, IBR-dominated grids, inverter-based resources.

leaves.name: Smart Grid Comms & Cybersecurity
leaves.tagline: Smart grid comms + cybersecurity, IEC 61850, grid SCADA cybersecurity.

leaves.name: EV Charging Power Electronics
leaves.tagline: EV charging power electronics, DC fast charging, bidirectional V2G electronics.

leaves.name: Motor Drives Power Electronics
leaves.tagline: Motor drives power electronics, traction inverters, EV motor drives.

leaves.name: Solar PV Grid Integration
leaves.tagline: Solar PV grid integration, PV inverter control, PV-storage hybrid systems.

leaves.name: Wind Grid Integration
leaves.tagline: Wind grid integration, offshore wind power systems, wind-storage co-located.

leaves.name: BESS Grid Integration
leaves.tagline: BESS grid integration, grid-forming inverters, BESS ancillary services.

leaves.name: EV Traction Motors
leaves.tagline: EV traction motors, axial flux, switched reluctance, magnet-free motor designs.

leaves.name: Massive MIMO for 5G/6G
leaves.tagline: Massive MIMO for 5G/6G, cell-free MIMO, mmWave + sub-THz MIMO PHY.

leaves.name: RIS Surfaces
leaves.tagline: RIS — reconfigurable intelligent surfaces, RIS-aided wireless systems.

leaves.name: LEO Mega-Constellations
leaves.tagline: LEO mega-constellations, satellite-to-cell, NTN-cellular integration.

leaves.name: LDPC & Polar Codes
leaves.tagline: LDPC + polar codes, modern channel coding, near-Shannon-limit decoders.

leaves.name: V2X Vehicular Networks
leaves.tagline: V2X vehicular networks, C-V2X, V2X edge computing for autonomous driving.

leaves.name: Low-Power IoT Systems
leaves.tagline: Low-power IoT systems, narrowband IoT, energy-efficient IoT MCUs.

leaves.name: Datacenter Photonic Networks
leaves.tagline: DCN photonics, photonic + optical-circuit switching in datacenters.

leaves.name: Implantable Bioelectronics
leaves.tagline: Implantable bioelectronics, ultra-low-power implants, biocompatible electronics.

leaves.name: Wearable Physiology Sensors
leaves.tagline: Wearable physiology monitors, continuous ECG/PPG/temperature, soft wearable electronics.

leaves.name: BCI Multichannel Recording ICs
leaves.tagline: BCI multichannel neural recording IC, Neuralink-class systems, ECoG ICs.

leaves.name: Neurostimulation Hardware
leaves.tagline: Neurostimulation hardware, DBS hardware, closed-loop neurostim systems.

leaves.name: ML ASICs
leaves.tagline: ML ASICs, dataflow architectures (TPU-class), inference accelerators.

leaves.name: FPGA for ML
leaves.tagline: FPGA for ML, real-time ML on FPGAs, latency-critical FPGA inference.

leaves.name: RRAM & Compute-in-Memory
leaves.tagline: RRAM-based compute-in-memory, in-memory ML accelerators, MRAM-IMC.

leaves.name: Spiking Neural Processors
leaves.tagline: Spiking neural processors, neuromorphic chips, Loihi-class systems.

leaves.name: Photonic Neural Networks
leaves.tagline: Photonic neural networks, optical computing for ML, integrated photonic ML.

leaves.name: IMU & Inertial MEMS
leaves.tagline: IMU + inertial MEMS, gyroscope research, navigation-grade IMUs.

leaves.name: Gas & Environmental Sensors
leaves.tagline: Gas + environmental sensors, MOS gas sensors, environmental MEMS sensors.

leaves.name: Electrochemical Biosensors
leaves.tagline: Electrochemical biosensors, glucose, cortisol + wearable biosensors.

leaves.name: FET-Based Biosensors
leaves.tagline: FET-based biosensors, BioFETs, label-free biosensing.

leaves.name: Sensor Fusion & Calibration
leaves.tagline: Sensor fusion, calibration methods, distributed sensor networks.

leaves.name: Reconfigurable & Phased Antennas
leaves.tagline: Reconfigurable antennas, phased arrays, beam-steering antennas for 5G/6G.

leaves.name: EM Computation & CAD
leaves.tagline: EM computation + CAD for microwave circuits, fast solvers for antennas.

leaves.name: Automotive ECUs & Real-Time Systems
leaves.tagline: Automotive ECUs, real-time embedded systems, AUTOSAR-class architectures.

leaves.name: Hardware Security & Side-Channel
leaves.tagline: Hardware security, side-channel attacks on embedded, secure-boot, root-of-trust.

uncovered_concerns: Each L3 gets 1-3 L4 — engineering L3 is already specific.
